'''tapovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyet|pyet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyet|pyet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tapovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæpeveth|tæpeveth]] || [[word:tæpevej|tæpevej]] || [[word:tæpevesh|tæpevesh]] || [[word:tæpeve|tæpeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tapopovoth|tapopovoth]] || [[word:tapopovoj|tapopovoj]] || [[word:tapopovosh|tapopovosh]] || [[word:tapopovo|tapopovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tapovoth|tapovoth]] || [[word:tapovoj|tapovoj]] || [[word:tapovosh|tapovosh]] || [[word:tapovo|tapovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tapofvoth|tapofvoth]] || [[word:tapofvoj|tapofvoj]] || [[word:tapofvosh|tapofvosh]] || [[word:tapofvof|tapofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tapovotho|tapovotho]] || [[word:tapovojo|tapovojo]] || [[word:tapovosho|tapovosho]] || [[word:tapovoko|tapovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tapovoth|tapovoth]] || [[word:tapovoj|tapovoj]] || [[word:tapovosh|tapovosh]] || [[word:tapovo|tapovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tapovothol|tapovothol]] || [[word:tapovojol|tapovojol]] || [[word:tapovoshol|tapovoshol]] || [[word:tapovokol|tapovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tapovothotho|tapovothotho]] || [[word:tapovojojo|tapovojojo]] || [[word:tapovoshosho|tapovoshosho]] || [[word:tapovoko|tapovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tapovothon|tapovothon]] || [[word:tapovojon|tapovojon]] || [[word:tapovoshon|tapovoshon]] || [[word:tapovokon|tapovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tapovothoro|tapovothoro]] || [[word:tapovojoro|tapovojoro]] || [[word:tapovoshoro|tapovoshoro]] || [[word:tapovokoro|tapovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
